summary: Iteration 160: Secret Rotation Ops Panel - Full E2E testing. Backend APIs (dashboard, audit, overdue) return correct data. Frontend RotationOpsPanel renders correctly with all required components: Risk Summary Cards, Rotation Dashboard table, Audit Trail, and Secret Detail Sheet. All data-testid attributes present. Column sorting works. Turkish language labels displayed correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: RotationOpsPanel correctly fetches data from /ops/secrets/rotation/dashboard and /audit endpoints
Risk Summary Cards calculate: Süresi Geçmiş (overdue), Uyarı (warning), Son 7 Gün Rollback, Test Başarısız, En Riskli connector
Rotation Dashboard table shows all required columns: Durum, Connector, Secret Path, Aktif V., Son Rotasyon, Sonraki Due, Yaş
Secret Detail Sheet displays: status, connector, active version, age, rotation timeline, version history, action buttons
Audit Trail shows rotation history with action types: Test BAŞARISIZ, Başlatıldı, Geri Alındı, Aktifleştirildi, Test Edildi
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
Column sorting implemented for Durum, Connector, and Yaş columns
Turkish language labels used throughout: 'Secret Rotation Yönetimi', 'Süresi Geçmiş', 'Uyarı', etc.

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 3 rotation endpoints tested (dashboard, audit, overdue)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components render correctly, interactions work

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 160 verified the Secret Rotation Ops Panel UI. The panel is located at /control-plane page, integrated within SecurityOpsDashboard component. All features working: (1) Risk Summary Cards show overdue/warning/rollback/test-fail counts and riskiest connector, (2) Rotation Dashboard table displays 5 secrets with status badges, dates, age progress bars, (3) Audit Trail shows 51 rotation events with expand/collapse, (4) Secret Detail Sheet opens via eye icon showing full secret details with version history and action buttons, (5) Column sorting works for Durum/Connector/Yaş. Backend APIs tested: GET /api/ops/secrets/rotation/dashboard (5 items, all healthy), GET /api/ops/secrets/rotation/audit?limit=5 (51 total records), GET /api/ops/secrets/rotation/overdue (0 overdue). All data-testid attributes verified present.
mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints backed by real MongoDB
